steps: Locate and photograph the plants you are identifying
Document visual characteristics (leaves, bark, flowers, fruits)
Note the plant's size, shape, and growth pattern
Record environmental conditions and habitat
Assess overall health and note any issues
Upload photos and complete the identification form
tips: Take photos from consistent angles for comparison over time
Note weather and seasonal conditions
Use custom names to track specific plants (e.g., 'Oak Tree by Front Gate')
Regular observations help identify patterns and issues early

steps: Check soil moisture before watering
Photograph the plants and area before watering
Select appropriate watering method for the plants
Water plants thoroughly according to their needs
Record water amount used and method applied
Take after photos and document any plant observations

materials: Water source (hose, watering can, bucket, etc.)

tips: Check soil moisture before watering (stick your finger 2-3 inches deep)
Water early morning or late evening to reduce evaporation
Deep, infrequent watering is better than frequent shallow watering
Adjust watering based on weather conditions and plant needs
Document soil condition before and after for tracking

steps: Photograph the area before cleanup begins
Safely collect and sort litter by type
Count and weigh collected items if possible
Take photos of collected litter for documentation
Properly dispose of or recycle collected materials
Photograph the cleaned area and submit your report
tips: Wear gloves for safety and hygiene
Take before/after comparison photos
Sort items for proper recycling when possible
Work in teams for larger areas and safety

steps: Photograph the planting location before starting
Prepare the soil and planting area according to plant requirements
Plant at appropriate depth and spacing for the species
Water thoroughly if needed
Take after photos documenting the completed planting
Record plant type, species/name, count, and any observations

materials: Plants (trees, seedlings, shrubs, or other vegetation)

tips: Choose planting time based on climate and plant type
Research proper depth and spacing for your specific plant
Take clear before/after photos from the same angle
Label plants or keep records for future reference

steps: Assess harvest readiness and optimal timing
Gather harvesting tools and containers
Photograph the crops before harvesting
Harvest carefully to avoid damage to plants and produce
Record quantity, quality, and any observations
Take photos of harvested produce and cleaned area

materials: Harvest tools (knife, scissors, pruning shears, basket)

tips: Harvest at optimal time of day (usually morning for best quality)
Handle produce carefully to avoid bruising
Track harvest yield over time for planning future crops
Document any pest or disease issues for garden records
Clean and store produce properly to maintain freshness

steps: Review the action requirements carefully
Gather necessary materials and tools
Document the before state with photos
Complete the action according to guidelines
Document the after state with photos
Submit your completed work for verification
tips: Document your work thoroughly with clear photos
Provide detailed descriptions in your submission
Ask questions if any requirements are unclear
Share learnings with your community

actions.title: Site & Readiness Setup
actions.description: Document solar hub site preparation, readiness assessment, and any permissions or agreements secured. Captures site conditions and readiness level for solar infrastructure deployment.

media.title: Capture Site Photos
media.description: Take photos of the site location, any existing infrastructure, and permission documentation if available.

details.title: Site Readiness Details
details.description: Provide details about the site setup and readiness assessment.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about site conditions, challenges, or next steps

review.title: Review Site Setup
review.description: Review the site readiness details before submitting.

actions.title: Infrastructure Milestone
actions.description: Record installation progress milestones for solar panels, batteries, internet equipment, or retrofits. Document capacity values and supporting evidence.

media.title: Capture Install Photos
media.description: Take photos of the installed equipment, invoice or receipt if available.

details.title: Milestone Details
details.description: Provide details about this infrastructure milestone.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about installation quality, challenges, or deviations from plan

inputs.title: Milestone Value
inputs.placeholder: Enter the numeric value for this milestone

review.title: Review Milestone
review.description: Review the infrastructure milestone details before submitting.

actions.title: Hub Service Session
actions.description: Document a session where the solar hub was open for community use. Track services provided, duration, and number of users served.

media.title: Capture Hub in Use
media.description: Take a privacy-safe photo of the hub during the service session.

details.title: Service Session Details
details.description: Provide details about this hub service session.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about user needs, issues, or observations

inputs.title: Hours Open
inputs.placeholder: Enter hours the hub was open

inputs.title: Users Served
inputs.placeholder: Enter the number of users served

review.title: Review Service Session
review.description: Review the service session details before submitting.

actions.title: Energy & Uptime Check
actions.description: Record energy generation data and system uptime. Document meter readings and any issues affecting performance.

media.title: Capture Meter/Inverter Photo
media.description: Take a photo of the meter or inverter display showing current readings.

details.title: Energy & Uptime Details
details.description: Provide energy generation and uptime data for this check period.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about system performance, maintenance needs, or weather impacts

inputs.title: Uptime Level
inputs.placeholder: Select uptime band for this period

review.title: Review Energy Check
review.description: Review the energy and uptime data before submitting.

actions.title: Node Operation Log
actions.description: Document blockchain node operations including uptime, yield, and proof of operation. Supports dashboard screenshots or on-chain transaction proof.

media.title: Capture Node Proof
media.description: Take a dashboard screenshot or provide on-chain proof of node operation.

details.title: Node Operation Details
details.description: Provide details about node performance and yield for this period.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about node performance, issues, or network conditions

inputs.title: Node Uptime
inputs.placeholder: Select uptime band for this period

inputs.title: Yield (ETH)
inputs.placeholder: Enter ETH yield for this period

review.title: Review Node Log
review.description: Review the node operation details before submitting.

actions.title: Site Assessment & Species Plan
actions.description: Document baseline site conditions and plan the species mix for a planting area. Record planned seedling counts, area coverage, and terrain characteristics.

media.title: Capture Baseline Photos
media.description: Take photos of the site showing current conditions, terrain, and vegetation.

details.title: Site & Species Plan Details
details.description: Provide details about the planned planting site and species selection.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about soil quality, water access, or site-specific considerations

review.title: Review Site Plan
review.description: Review the site assessment and species plan before submitting.

actions.title: Planting Event
actions.description: Document a planting event including number of seedlings planted, species, participants involved, and planting method used.

media.title: Capture Planting Photos
media.description: Take photos of the planting activity, showing seedlings, participants, and the planting site.

details.title: Planting Event Details
details.description: Provide details about this planting event.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about conditions, challenges, or observations during planting

review.title: Review Planting Event
review.description: Review the planting event details before submitting.

actions.title: Survival Check
actions.description: Document survival rates of planted seedlings at checkpoints. Take repeat-angle photos and record alive vs checked counts to track survival over time.

media.title: Capture Plot Photos
media.description: Take repeat-angle photos of the planting plots to track growth and survival.

details.title: Survival Check Details
details.description: Provide details about the survival check results.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about plant health, growth patterns, or environmental factors

inputs.title: Checked Count
inputs.placeholder: Enter total number of seedlings checked

review.title: Review Survival Check
review.description: Review the survival check details before submitting.

actions.title: Maintenance Activity
actions.description: Document routine garden maintenance activities including watering, weeding, mulching, fencing, and pest management.

media.title: Capture Maintenance Photo
media.description: Take a photo showing the maintenance work performed.

details.title: Maintenance Details
details.description: Provide details about the maintenance activity performed.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about conditions, materials used, or observations

inputs.title: Activity Count (optional)
inputs.placeholder: Enter number of discrete tasks completed

review.title: Review Maintenance
review.description: Review the maintenance activity details before submitting.

actions.title: Learning Reflection
actions.description: Capture learning insights from garden activities. A low-effort action for documenting what worked, what failed, and next steps.

media.title: Optional Photo
media.description: Optionally attach a photo related to your learning observation.

details.title: Learning Reflection Details
details.description: Share your insights and observations from recent garden activities.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Describe what you learned, observed, or want to try next

review.title: Review Reflection
review.description: Review your learning reflection before submitting.

actions.title: Harvest & Yield Record
actions.description: Document harvest events including crop type, yield weight, harvest count, and distribution method. Photo of scale reading increases verification confidence.

media.title: Capture Harvest Photos
media.description: Take photos of the harvest. A scale photo with weight reading is optional but increases confidence.

details.title: Harvest & Yield Details
details.description: Provide details about this harvest event.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about harvest quality, challenges, or distribution plans

inputs.title: Harvest Count
inputs.placeholder: Enter number of harvest items or batches

review.title: Review Harvest
review.description: Review the harvest and yield details before submitting.

actions.title: Publish Session & Open Roster
actions.description: Announce and publish an upcoming educational session. Document planned duration, capacity, session type, and venue details.

media.title: Attach Flyer or Poster
media.description: Optionally attach a flyer, poster, or screenshot of the session announcement.

details.title: Session Planning Details
details.description: Provide details about the planned educational session.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Additional notes about the session plan, prerequisites, or logistics

inputs.title: Planned Duration (min)
inputs.placeholder: Enter planned session duration in minutes

review.title: Review Session Plan
review.description: Review the session details before publishing.

actions.title: Workshop Delivered
actions.description: Document a completed educational workshop or session. Record delivered duration, facilitator count, and format details.

media.title: Capture Workshop Photo
media.description: Take a photo of the room, materials, or session in progress.

details.title: Workshop Delivery Details
details.description: Provide details about the delivered workshop session.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about engagement, challenges, or feedback received

inputs.title: Delivered Duration (min)
inputs.placeholder: Enter actual session duration in minutes

review.title: Review Workshop
review.description: Review the workshop delivery details before submitting.

actions.title: Attendance Verified
actions.description: Verify and document attendance for an educational session. Record attendee count, verification method, and privacy mode used.

media.title: Capture Attendance Proof
media.description: Upload a roster export, QR scan screenshot, or attendance record.

details.title: Attendance Verification Details
details.description: Provide details about the verified attendance.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about verification process or any discrepancies

review.title: Review Attendance
review.description: Review the attendance verification details before submitting.

actions.title: Follow-up Action Logged
actions.description: Document a follow-up action taken after an educational session. Captures proof of real-world application such as wallet setup, on-chain transactions, or project contributions.

media.title: Capture Proof
media.description: Upload a screenshot or proof of the follow-up action taken.

details.title: Follow-up Action Details
details.description: Provide details about the follow-up action taken.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about the experience, challenges, or next steps planned

inputs.title: Follow-up Type
inputs.placeholder: Select what type of follow-up action

review.title: Review Follow-up
review.description: Review the follow-up action details before submitting.

actions.title: Learning Assessment
actions.description: Document a learning assessment result (quiz, project, or practical evaluation). Record pass/fail status, score range, and assessment type.

media.title: Capture Assessment Proof
media.description: Upload a screenshot of the quiz result, project output, or assessment record.

details.title: Assessment Details
details.description: Provide details about the learning assessment.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about the assessment experience, difficulty, or areas for improvement

review.title: Review Assessment
review.description: Review the learning assessment details before submitting.

actions.title: Site Assessment (Before)
actions.description: Document the baseline condition of a waste site before cleanup. Record site size, waste severity level, and waste types present.

media.title: Capture Before Photos
media.description: Take photos showing the current waste conditions at the site.

details.title: Site Assessment Details
details.description: Provide details about the waste site conditions.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about accessibility, hazards, or environmental concerns

review.title: Review Site Assessment
review.description: Review the site assessment details before submitting.

actions.title: Cleanup Event
actions.description: Document a waste cleanup event including participants, duration, amount removed, and methods used. Before/after photos required.

media.title: Capture Before/After Photos
media.description: Take photos showing the site before and after cleanup.

details.title: Cleanup Event Details
details.description: Provide details about the cleanup event.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about challenges, community response, or follow-up needs

review.title: Review Cleanup Event
review.description: Review the cleanup event details before submitting.

actions.title: Sorting & Breakdown
actions.description: Document waste sorting results with per-category weight breakdown. Uses a repeater for category-by-category entries.

media.title: Capture Sorted Piles Photo
media.description: Take a photo showing the sorted waste categories.

details.title: Sorting Breakdown Details
details.description: Provide the total weight and per-category breakdown.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about contamination levels, unusual materials, or sorting challenges

inputs.title: Total Amount (kg)
inputs.placeholder: Enter total sorted weight in kilograms

inputs.title: Category Breakdown
inputs.placeholder: Add each waste category and its weight

review.title: Review Sorting Breakdown
review.description: Review the sorting breakdown details before submitting.

actions.title: Recycler/Disposal Transfer
actions.description: Document the transfer of sorted waste to a recycling facility or disposal site. Record amount, disposition type, and receipt proof.

media.title: Capture Receipt/Facility Proof
media.description: Upload a photo of the transfer receipt, facility gate, or weigh-in ticket.

details.title: Transfer Details
details.description: Provide details about the waste transfer and disposition.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about facility conditions, transport logistics, or pricing

inputs.title: Disposition
inputs.placeholder: Select what happened to the waste

review.title: Review Transfer Receipt
review.description: Review the transfer details before submitting.

actions.title: Compost/Upcycle Batch
actions.description: Document a compost or upcycling batch including input materials, output products, and batch type.

media.title: Capture Batch Photo
media.description: Take a photo of the batch materials, compost pile, or upcycled products.

details.title: Batch Details
details.description: Provide details about the compost or upcycle batch.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about batch quality, processing time, or challenges

inputs.title: Input (kg)
inputs.placeholder: Enter input material weight in kilograms

inputs.title: Output (kg)
inputs.placeholder: Enter output product weight in kilograms

review.title: Review Batch
review.description: Review the batch details before submitting.

actions.title: Recurring Maintenance Check
actions.description: Document a recurring site maintenance check for waste accumulation. Track residual waste levels and site condition over time.

media.title: Capture Site Photo
media.description: Take a photo of the site showing current waste conditions.

details.title: Maintenance Check Details
details.description: Provide details about the site condition and any waste removed.
details.feedbackPlaceholder: Notes about trends, new dumping, or community engagement

review.title: Review Maintenance Check
review.description: Review the maintenance check details before submitting.
